type: ACCEPT

note: Agreed - region split confirmed. My batch_size touches: (1) Option.__init__ signature - append 'batch_size: int | None = None' as the last kwarg, (2) end of Option.__init__ body - append a validation block (raise ValueError if batch_size is negative, raise ValueError if batch_size set but multiple is False) and 'self.batch_size = batch_size', (3) Option.to_info_dict - add 'batch_size' key to the returned dict, (4) a new method on Option (e.g. type_cast_value override or a small chunk helper) placed after to_info_dict to yield batched tuples when multiple+batch_size are set. I won't touch Command.main(), get_help_record, or types.py. Go ahead and start now since you're ready - ping me (DONE) when your Option.__init__ body edits are complete and I'll re-read the file fresh before making mine.
